text.title: Backlog Management Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Backlog Management end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: baseline
step.action: Count items, measure capacity ratio, identify drift items >cap.

step.name: set-policy
step.action: Choose ≤3 states, age caps, grooming slot.

step.name: groom
step.action: Run weekly grooming: close / merge / demote / promote.

step.name: review-ratio
step.action: Monthly: check capacity ratio; if ratio >3× → cut.
